name: national_security_near_miss_event_millhaven_tru_loy
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In National Security, the situation tagged internally around national security near miss event millhaven tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A union or patient advocate group is on the line demanding a written commitment before the next operational shift. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Marco Okoye
agents.identity: I am Marco Okoye, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in National Security. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ansel Dubois
agents.identity: I am Ansel Dubois, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in National Security. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on loyalty.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on loyalty for immediate traction on truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Marco Okoye must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Marco Okoye do?
